data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a hard block when required forms are missing. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations confirming that the system enforces a hard block under these conditions. The linked use case explicitly states that booking is blocked until required consent forms are signed, but there is no evidence in the prior steps that demonstrates this functionality is implemented or validated, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a hard block being enforced when required forms are missing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement hard block validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system blocks booking if required forms are not signed.
